message:
test(proptest): add 20 property tests for ApprovalTracker workflow types

Cover serde roundtrips for ApprovalStatus, ApprovalEntry, ApprovalRequest,
and ApprovalTrackerSnapshot. Behavioral tests cover unique ID generation,
submit→approve/reject/revoke state transitions, cannot-approve-non-pending
invariant, expire_stale deadline enforcement, eviction bounds, snapshot
counter consistency, and time-range filtering.

Note: tests compile clean but execution pending system load reduction
(dyld bottleneck with 39+ concurrent cargo processes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
